DurationSlider

Stable

A segmented slider component with snap points for selecting duration values (20s, 60s, 90s, 15min). Supports keyboard navigation, mouse dragging, and manual input.

Overview

The DurationSlider is a polished slider component that snaps to predefined duration detents: 20 seconds, 60 seconds (1 minute), 90 seconds (1.5 minutes), and 900 seconds (15 minutes). It features smooth animations, keyboard navigation, and an inline manual input editor for precise values.

Live Demo

Click the slider below to select a duration. You can also click the label to enter a custom value.

Current Duration: Standard (1m)

20s
60s
90s
15min

Disabled State

20s
60s
90s
15min

Props

Prop Type Default Description
value 20 | 60 | 90 | 900 - Current selected duration in seconds.
onChange (value: 20 | 60 | 90 | 900) => void - Callback when the selected duration changes.
disabled boolean false Disables the slider.
className string - Additional CSS classes to merge.

Usage

duration-slider-basic.tsx 
import { DurationSlider } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function DurationExample() {
  const [duration, setDuration] = React.useState<20 | 60 | 90 | 900>(60);

  return (
    <DurationSlider
      value={duration}
      onChange={setDuration}
    />
  );
}

Keyboard Navigation

  • Arrow Left / Arrow Down — Move to the previous detent
  • Arrow Right / Arrow Up — Move to the next detent
  • Home — Jump to the first detent (20s)
  • End — Jump to the last detent (900s)
  • Tab to current label, then Enter — Open manual input editor

Edge Cases

Manual Input

Click the current selection label to open a manual input editor. Enter a value between 1 and 900 seconds. Values outside this range are ignored. Press Enter to confirm or Escape to cancel.

Disabled State

When disabled, all interaction (clicking, dragging, keyboard, manual input) is prevented. The slider appears with reduced opacity.

Interactive Preview
